market_session: Japan equity market close; Nikkei Indexes official daily-summary basis

calculation.method: reported close, daily point change, percent change, open, high, low, and previous close from Nikkei Indexes official daily summary

text: Nikkei Indexes showed the Nikkei 225 closed June 19, 2026 at 71,250.06, up 196.57 points or 0.28%, a new record close, with an intraday range of 70,517.98 to 71,952.99 and a previous close of 71,053.49.

market_session: Japan equity market close; Nikkei Indexes official daily-summary basis
text: Nikkei Indexes reported 66 advancers versus 157 decliners and 2 unchanged among Nikkei 225 constituents, with Technology contributing +283.89 yen and Materials +148.75 yen while Consumer Goods subtracted 167.16 yen and Financials subtracted 42.75 yen, indicating a narrow technology-led advance despite the record close.

market_session: Japan equity market close; Investing.com TOPIX historical-data and CNBC-cited basis

calculation.method: reported close, open, and percent change from Investing.com TOPIX historical table cross-checked against CNBC market report

text: Investing.com and CNBC showed the broader TOPIX index fell 0.57% to close at 4,044.96 on June 19, 2026, diverging from the Nikkei 225's record close.

market_session: Korea regular-session close; Investing.com KOSPI historical-data basis

calculation.method: reported close, daily point change, percent change, open, high, low, previous close, and volume from Investing.com KOSPI historical table

text: Investing.com's KOSPI historical table showed a June 19, 2026 close of 9,052.42, down 11.42 points or 0.13% from the prior record close of 9,063.84, with an intraday range of 8,831.72 to 9,385.59 and volume of 511.08M.

market_session: Korea regular-session close; CNBC and Investing.com basis
text: CNBC reported Samsung Electronics reversed earlier gains and fell 2.34% while SK Hynix rose 2.94% and the small-cap Kosdaq dropped 3.43%; the KOSPI itself opened at 9,288.89, rose to an intraday high of 9,385.59, then plunged to a low of 8,831.72 before recovering to close at 9,052.42.

market_session: No session; Greater China markets closed for Dragon Boat Festival
text: Markets in Hong Kong, Shanghai and Taiwan were closed on June 19, 2026 for the Dragon Boat Festival; Trading Economics and the AP market wrap confirmed the closure, with Shanghai's last close at 4,090.48 and the Hang Seng-linked quote last at 23,924.81 on June 18.

subject.index_group: tracked Asia indexes with June 19 session

market_session: Asia local market closes for June 19, 2026

calculation.method: compared reported daily percent changes for the three tracked Asia indexes that held a regular session on June 19, 2026

text: On June 19, 2026, three of the six tracked Asia indexes were closed for the Dragon Boat Festival; among the three that traded, the Nikkei 225 was strongest at +0.28% (record close) while the TOPIX was weakest at -0.57%, and the KOSPI closed down 0.13% after a volatile intraday reversal.
